text: 请从工程角度简要说明稀疏专家模型中路由器、专家缓存和固态硬盘读取之间的关系，并指出缓存命中率为什么会影响逐 token 推理延迟。
Explain how expert routing, RAM cache capacity, and SSD bandwidth interact in a tiered-memory mixture-of-experts inference runtime.
Write a compact Python LRU cache with get and put methods, then explain the eviction invariant in two sentences.
A model activates eight 6 MiB experts in each of forty layers. Calculate the cold expert bytes required per token and show the steps.
Continue our design review of a tiered-memory MoE runtime. Compare a 2 GiB expert cache with an 8 GiB cache, focusing on locality, disk reads, and latency.
